hero.name: Raj Vadhavana
hero.tagline: I create beautiful, responsive websites with modern technologies. Passionate about solving problems and building digital experiences.

about.title: Frontend Developer
about.short: Hello! I'm Raj, a Passionate Web Developer skilled in HTML, CSS & JavaScript | Focused on clean UI, fast performance & accessibility | Exploring Full-Stack, Python & AI/ML
about.long: I'm a passionate Frontend Developer who loves turning ideas into interactive and visually appealing websites. With skills in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and modern frameworks, I enjoy creating designs that are not only beautiful but also responsive and user-friendly. For me, coding is like solving a creative puzzle—every project is a chance to bring something exciting to life.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: Personal portfolio website built with HTML, CSS & JavaScript. Features smooth animations, responsive design and dynamic content loading.

projects.title: Hostel Admission System
projects.description: A complete hostel admission management website with student registration, room allocation and admin panel.

experience.description: Building web projects using HTML, CSS, JavaScript. Learning PHP, MySQL, Python and exploring AI/ML.
